description: Current national-level regulations governing information control, censorship, data sharing, transparency, and audits to inform information governance design.
steps_to_find: Search official government legislation portals (national/regional gazettes)
Review regulator publications and white papers
Extract applicable sections on information control, censorship, data sharing, transparency, and audits

description: National ethics guidelines and oversight policies that define independence, committee structures, and accountability for governance decisions.
steps_to_find: Search ethics commissions and parliamentary policy documents
Review statutory guidelines and ethics codes
Consult cross-border frameworks (e.g., OECD) for reference

document_name: Official Critical Infrastructure Risk Management Regulations
description: Regulations and guidance governing risk management for critical infrastructure to frame risk planning and mitigation.
steps_to_find: Identify relevant agencies (e.g., DHS-like entities, national security agencies)
Locate risk management and redundancy requirements
Extract reporting, auditing, and compliance provisions

description: Recent national-level mental health survey data to assess confinement-related psychosocial implications and baseline well-being metrics.
steps_to_find: Consult WHO Global Health Observatory and national surveys
Extract point-in-time prevalence, access to services, and well-being indicators

description: Geotechnical, geological and groundwater datasets for potential underground construction sites in Nevada.
steps_to_find: Contact USGS Nevada and Nevada Bureau of Mines and Geology
Request site-specific geotechnical maps, rock/soil properties, groundwater data
Acquire any available geotechnical reports and hazard maps

description: Geotechnical and regional geological datasets for potential Siberian sites, including stability and hazard information.
steps_to_find: Engage Rosgeo or national geological services
Request regional geological surveys, cross-sections, and seismic data
Obtain translations or summaries as needed
